mapper.select: SELECT id, role_code, role_name, menu_perms, data_scope, status, remark, create_time, update_time FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, role_code, role_name, menu_perms, data_scope, status, remark, create_time, update_time FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role(role_code, role_name, menu_perms, data_scope, status, remark, create_time) VALUES(#{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{menuPerms}, #{dataScope}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime})
